modules.name: Internet and Web Services
modules.description: Covers internet fundamentals, HTTP protocol, JSON serialization, and RESTful web services.

lessons.title: Internet and Web Services
topics: Web application architecture (browser, HTTP server, database)
Web services: data-focused, no UI, HTTP-based

lessons.title: HTTP, JSON, and Web Services
topics: HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, HEAD, OPTIONS, PATCH, CONNECT, TRACE)
JSON as object notation and serialization format
